creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Sat Apr 12 11:54:46 2014
New Revision: 351089
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351089
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351089/

Log:
  - Stage support [1]
  - Add LICENSE [1]
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		188492 [1]
  Submitted by:	ports@robakdesign.com [1]

Deleted:
  head/devel/py-cclib/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/devel/py-cclib/Makefile
  head/devel/py-cclib/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/py-cclib/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-cclib/Makefile	Sat Apr 12 11:32:16 2014	(r351088)
+++ head/devel/py-cclib/Makefile	Sat Apr 12 11:54:46 2014	(r351089)
@@ -8,14 +8,16 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
-MAINTAINER=	wen@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	ports@robakdesign.com
 COMMENT=	Parsers And Algorithms For Computational Chemistry
 
+LICENSE=	APACHE20
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYNUMPY}
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYNUMPY}
 
-USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYTHON=		yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/py-cclib/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-cclib/pkg-descr	Sat Apr 12 11:32:16 2014	(r351088)
+++ head/devel/py-cclib/pkg-descr	Sat Apr 12 11:54:46 2014	(r351089)
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@ interpreting the results of computationa
 version, cclib 0.9, parses output files from ADF, GAMESS (US), GAMESS-UK,
 Gaussian, Jaguar, Molpro, ORCA and PC GAMESS.
 
-WWW:  http://cclib.sourceforge.net/
+WWW: http://cclib.sourceforge.net/
